Syntax Definition wcel 2203
Description: Extend wff definition to include the membership connective between classes.

For a general discussion of the theory of classes, see mmset.html#class.

The purpose of introducing here is to allow us to prove the wel 2204 of predicate calculus in terms of the wceq 1398 of set theory, so that we do not overload the connective with two syntax definitions. This is done to prevent ambiguity that would complicate some Metamath parsers. The class variables and are introduced temporarily for the purpose of this definition but otherwise not used in predicate calculus. See df-clab 2219 for more information on the set theory usage of wcel 2203.

Hypotheses
Ref Expression
wcel.cA
wcel.cB
Assertion
Ref Expression
wcel
This syntax is primitive. The first axiom using it is ax-13 2205.
Colors of variables: wff set class
